name: Kaz Brekker | Dirtyhands
description:
🐦‍⬛ | “We’ve been through worst.. now pull your head out of your ass. I have a plan.”

RAHHH another one 💪🏾. I have another idea for another Kaz bot (but like honestly I don’t know if I’ll make it BUT I MADE THIS ONE). It’s taking me a while but I’m almost done with crooked kingdom, quite literally on the part after Kaz gets the Dregs back, but I have so many assignments I can’t even read. However I HAVE been reading a bunch of fanfiction (chefs kiss)

As always let me know if something’s wrong with the bot or if he starts talking funny.
creator: Cale-Kale
